meaning: 美国科罗拉多州(位于美国西部)
examples: Wintry weather continues to sweep across Colorado.
We went white-water rafting on the Colorado River.
He amazed us by his knowledge of Colorado history.
The National Weather Service has issued warnings of high chances of wildfire activity in nine states, including Colorado.
Gun-rights advocates call the Colorado bills unenforceable, feel-good measures that are likely to backfire.
